title: Leading underscore function names
summary: Functions with leading underscores are discouraged and commonly treated as a plugin review issue unless they are PHP magic methods.

detection.notes: Magic methods such as __construct are not matched by this pattern.

guidance.why_it_matters: WordPress.org review expects plugin code in the public namespace to use clear, unique names and avoids underscore-prefixed globals and functions.
guidance.fix: Rename helper functions to use a unique plugin prefix rather than a leading underscore.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Medium. String literals and commented code may still match.
